name: MSI PRO H610M-G WIFI DDR4 Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR4-3200- 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 1x M.2 Slot - USB 3.2 Gen1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - VGA - HDMI 2.1 - Intel GbE LAN - Intel Dual Band Wi-Fi 802.11ac (PROH610MGD4WIFI)
shortName: MSI PRO H610M-G WIFI DDR4 Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Micro-ATX H610 motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 socket with DDR4 support and integrated WiFi.
